gameFeature.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Master fast-paced roguelite action, switch weapons mid-combat, stack Blessings, and command the Shadow Army in Solo Leveling: Karma by Netmarble.

releaseDate.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Release Date & Launch Timeline
releaseDate.intro: Solo Leveling: Karma is an upcoming roguelite action RPG developed by Netmarble Neo and published by Netmarble. The game is scheduled for release in 2026 on PC, iOS, and Android, featuring an original storyline set during the unexplored 27-year war period of the Solo Leveling universe.

items.title: Official Game Announcement
items.description: Netmarble announced Solo Leveling: Karma as a new roguelite action RPG based on the Solo Leveling universe. The reveal introduced a new story exploring an untold period connected to Sung Jinwoo's journey.

items.title: Release Window Confirmed
items.description: Solo Leveling: Karma is planned for release in 2026 across PC, iOS, and Android platforms.

items.title: Gameplay and Story Reveals
items.description: Official trailers showcased the game's roguelite combat system, weapon switching, Blessings system, and Shadow Army-focused action gameplay.

beginnerGuide.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: Solo Leveling: Karma combines action RPG combat with roguelite progression. Players fight through repeated runs, combine abilities, strengthen their builds, and use different combat options to overcome changing battlefields.

steps.title: Understand Roguelite Runs
steps.description: Enter battle stages, defeat enemies, collect power upgrades, and improve your build during each run.

steps.title: Learn Combat Basics
steps.description: Master movement, attacks, weapon switching, and ability combinations to handle different enemy situations.

steps.title: Build Around Blessings
steps.description: Combine Blessings to create specialized playstyles and adapt your build based on available upgrades.

steps.title: Use the Shadow Army
steps.description: Fight alongside the Shadow Army and combine their support with your own combat abilities.

quickTips: Weapon switching mid-combat lets you adapt your attack patterns to different enemy types.
Blessings are the core of every run — pick the ones that strengthen your preferred playstyle.
The Shadow Army fights alongside Sung Jinwoo, adding extra damage and crowd control.
Each roguelite run reshapes your build, so experiment with new combinations every attempt.

combatGuide.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Combat Guide
combatGuide.intro: The combat system in Solo Leveling: Karma focuses on fast-paced action, flexible weapon usage, and build customization. Official gameplay showcases highlight seamless weapon switching, Blessings combinations, and battles alongside the Shadow Army.

cards.name: Weapon Switching
cards.description: Switch between different weapons during battles to adjust your strategy and create flexible attack patterns.

cards.name: Blessings
cards.description: Combine Blessings to enhance abilities and develop unique combat builds for each run.

cards.name: Shadow Army
cards.description: Fight together with Sung Jinwoo's Shadow Army to increase combat power and control battlefields.

cards.name: Roguelite Progression
cards.description: Improve your approach through repeated runs by experimenting with different combinations and strategies.

weaponsGuide.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Weapons Guide
weaponsGuide.intro: Solo Leveling: Karma features multiple weapons that can be switched during combat. Official gameplay footage emphasizes weapon variety and different playstyles, with detailed weapon statistics and the complete weapon list expanding as more official information is revealed.

items.strengths: Fast melee attacks and direct enemy engagement
Safer positioning and sustained ranged pressure
Supports different combinations with abilities and Blessings

blessingsGuide.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Blessings Guide
blessingsGuide.intro: Instead of fixed character builds, Solo Leveling: Karma revolves around Blessings that enhance skills, attributes, and combat style during each dungeon run. Official gameplay trailers show players combining multiple Blessings throughout a run to create unique builds while fighting alongside the Shadow Army.

cards.title: Skill Enhancement
cards.description: Blessings increase the effectiveness and level of combat skills obtained during a run, allowing abilities to become significantly stronger over time.

cards.title: Stat Growth
cards.description: Certain Blessings improve core combat attributes such as offensive power and overall combat efficiency, helping you survive increasingly difficult encounters.

cards.title: Build Diversity
cards.description: Because Blessings are selected during each roguelite run, different combinations encourage varied playstyles instead of a single optimal build.

cards.title: Weapon Synergy
cards.description: Official gameplay shows multiple weapon types including daggers, dual blades, greatswords, bows, scythes, and hammers. Blessings can be combined with different weapon choices to shape each run.

cards.title: Shadow Army Synergy
cards.description: Blessings work alongside Sung Jinwoo's Shadow Army, creating combinations between player attacks, summoned Shadows, and combo skills.

cards.title: Replay Value
cards.description: The Blessing system is designed to make every dungeon run feel different by offering new combinations and progression choices.

bossGuide.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Boss Guide
bossGuide.intro: Netmarble has showcased multiple major bosses from the original Solo Leveling series in Solo Leveling: Karma. Each encounter features unique mechanics inspired by the source material and serves as a major challenge during dungeon progression.

items.title: Cerberus (Gatekeeper of Hell)
items.content: A massive three-headed guardian that uses aggressive melee attacks and wide-area fire attacks. Players must avoid sustained damage while finding safe attack windows.

items.title: Hobgoblin Leader
items.content: Commands groups of supporting enemies while pressuring players with powerful close-range attacks, requiring crowd control and careful positioning.

items.title: Avaricious Vulcan
items.content: A giant demon boss known for heavy attacks and large-area damage, demanding careful timing and sustained damage output.

items.title: Demonic King Baran
items.content: One of the most recognizable enemies from Solo Leveling. Official footage confirms his appearance in Solo Leveling: Karma as a major high-level boss encounter.

items.title: Godlike Statue of Cartenon Temple
items.content: The iconic Statue of God returns with large-scale attacks inspired by the original Double Dungeon sequence, emphasizing movement and survival.

characters.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Characters
characters.intro: Solo Leveling: Karma focuses on Sung Jinwoo's previously untold war against the Monarchs. Official trailers have also introduced several original characters created specifically for the game's storyline.

cards.title: Sung Jinwoo
cards.description: The Shadow Monarch and the playable protagonist of Solo Leveling: Karma. The story follows his hidden 27-year war inside the Dimensional Gap while commanding the Shadow Army.

cards.title: Iron
cards.description: One of Jinwoo's iconic Shadow Soldiers, confirmed through official gameplay demonstrations as a summonable ally during combat.

cards.title: Igris
cards.description: The loyal knight of the Shadow Army returns as a summonable companion capable of participating in signature combo attacks.

cards.title: Original Purple-Haired Character
cards.description: An original character created specifically for Solo Leveling: Karma who appears prominently in the official story trailers.

cards.title: Original Red-Haired Character
cards.description: A newly introduced character shown confronting Jinwoo in promotional footage, expected to play a significant role in the original narrative.

systemRequirements.title: Solo Leveling: Karma Platforms & System Requirements
systemRequirements.intro: Solo Leveling: Karma will launch on both PC and mobile devices. Official platform availability has already been announced, with detailed hardware specifications to be added once released by Netmarble.

items.details: Official specifications will be published closer to launch.
Official specifications will be published closer to launch.
The compatible device list will be shared closer to launch.
Supported iPhone and iPad models will be shared closer to launch.
Controller compatibility details will be confirmed closer to launch.
Cross-save and cross-progression details will be shared closer to launch.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Solo Leveling: Karma

questions.question: What is Solo Leveling: Karma?
questions.answer: Solo Leveling: Karma is an anime roguelite action RPG developed by Netmarble Neo and published by Netmarble, set in the Solo Leveling universe and built around weapon switching, Blessings, and the Shadow Army.

questions.question: When is the Solo Leveling: Karma release date?
questions.answer: Solo Leveling: Karma is scheduled for release in 2026 on PC, iOS, and Android, with the official reveal timeline tracking every major announcement.

questions.question: Which platforms will Solo Leveling: Karma support?
questions.answer: Solo Leveling: Karma will be available on PC, iOS, and Android at launch, so players can enjoy the roguelite action across both desktop and mobile devices.

questions.question: What is the Blessings system in Solo Leveling: Karma?
questions.answer: In Solo Leveling: Karma, Blessings are the core roguelite progression mechanic that enhance skills, stats, and combat style during each run, letting you build a different playstyle every attempt.

questions.question: Who is the main character of Solo Leveling: Karma?
questions.answer: Solo Leveling: Karma follows Sung Jinwoo, the Shadow Monarch, during his untold 27-year war against the Monarchs while commanding the Shadow Army through the Dimensional Gap.

questions.question: Is Solo Leveling: Karma connected to the Solo Leveling anime and manhwa?
questions.answer: Yes. Solo Leveling: Karma tells an original story set during the unexplored 27-year gap of the Solo Leveling universe, expanding on Sung Jinwoo's journey alongside familiar faces and new characters.
